description: Metorial is an integration platform for AI agents built around MCP, with hosted tooling for deploying providers, managing sessions, and connecting external services. It provides a managed cloud platform, documentation, SDKs, and an API for working with integrations and agent infrastructure.
summary: Metorial exposes a REST HTTP API at `https://api.metorial.com` authenticated with Metorial API keys, plus a documented `metorial` CLI whose public auth mechanics are not specified on the site.
